behaviors.description: The generated function signature matches the expected interface (parameter names, types, return type) specified in the description.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on what the real LLM generates from natural language (signature fidelity), which a deterministic stub would mask. Rejected Workflow because this behavior is about one generation outcome, not a multi-step agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Run a live LLM generation for a prompt with a strict expected signature, parse the produced function definition, and assert parameter names/types/return type match the spec.

behaviors.description: Orchestration executes attempts in order and returns immediately on the first passing attempt.
behaviors.justification: This is module handoff/orchestration logic (attempt runner + test result handling + early-stop), and can be validated with deterministic local fakes. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real OS/network/subprocess contract checks or external round-trip side effects.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real orchestrator + attempt bookkeeping + local fake generator/test-runner modules; force fail-then-pass and assert attempt order and immediate stop after first pass.

behaviors.description: For a function that a single call usually fails, the live iterative loop can still produce a passing implementation within the allowed attempts.
behaviors.justification: Requires multiple real agentic steps in sequence (generate -> test feedback -> refine -> retest) and success depends on model behavior across attempts. Rejected Agentic because the behavior explicitly validates iterative loop success over multiple attempts.
behaviors.test_description: Use a known prompt where first live attempt commonly fails; run full live loop with real LLM and real retry/refinement flow; assert a later attempt (<=3) passes.

behaviors.description: When tests fail, the refinement prompt builder includes the failed test names and failure messages in the next LLM prompt.
behaviors.justification: Failure context must flow across local modules (test runner output -> prompt builder input). Rejected Agentic because behavior text targets prompt content construction, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run failing tests through the real test-result parser and prompt builder pipeline, then assert the next prompt contains exact failed test names and failure messages.

behaviors.description: The next live attempt changes implementation content in response to prior failure context rather than resubmitting the same code.
behaviors.justification: This checks cross-attempt adaptation with real LLM behavior over sequenced steps (initial generation, failure feedback, refined generation). Rejected Agentic because the behavior explicitly depends on multi-step handoff and second-step response to first-step context.
behaviors.test_description: Execute two live attempts with real failure feedback injection; assert second generated implementation materially differs from first and reflects referenced failure context.

behaviors.description: The service stops after 3 failed attempts and returns a structured error with all three attempts and their test results.
behaviors.justification: Validates orchestration/bookkeeping and error payload assembly across components; deterministic failing stubs are sufficient. Rejected System because no explicit external contract triad or real infra requirement is stated.
behaviors.test_description: Use deterministic always-fail generation/test modules; run orchestrator and assert exactly 3 attempts then structured error includes all three attempt records and test results.

behaviors.description: The full non-agentic pipeline wiring (generate call, test execution, attempt bookkeeping) works end to end with deterministic stubbed model outputs.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly says non-agentic and deterministic stubs; goal is end-to-end local wiring across modules. Rejected System because text does not explicitly require real external contract checks/round-trip visibility through external boundaries.
behaviors.test_description: Run the whole local pipeline with deterministic stub model outputs and real internal components (execution + bookkeeping), asserting expected per-attempt transitions and final status.

behaviors.description: The full live loop (generate, test, refine, retest) solves at least one known hard function that fails in the first attempt.
behaviors.justification: Explicitly a full live multi-step agent pipeline with sequential model-influenced stages and retry/refinement dependency. Rejected Agentic because behavior requires chained agentic steps, not a single model decision.
behaviors.test_description: Run the production loop with a real LLM on a curated hard function known to fail initially; verify first attempt fails and a later attempt in the same run succeeds.
